source_pr.title: executor: fix DATA RACE caused by change the global logger when testing
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #16713 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: `OOMTest` changes the global logger when testing, which may cause DATA RACE with other tests.

### What is changed and how it works?
Move `OOMTest` into an individual dir.

symptoms: PR title: fix DATA RACE caused by changing global logger when testing.
failure_signature: PR title: fix DATA RACE caused by changing global logger when testing.
root_cause_explanation: OOM tests changed the process-wide global logger during execution, which could race with other tests logging concurrently and trigger race detector failures. The fix moves OOM tests into a dedicated sequential suite and uses a mutex-protected log capturer, reducing shared global logger interference across parallel tests.
fix_pattern: Isolate OOM tests into a sequential suite and protect global logger capture with a mutex to avoid data races when replacing/using the global logger.

evidence: evidence: PR title: fix DATA RACE caused by changing global logger when testing.
evidence: moves OOM tests into a separate sequential suite and uses a mutex-protected log capturer to avoid races (executor/oomtest/oom_test.go, executor/seqtest/seq_executor_test.go).
